narrative:
Dayton 7-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 480 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 41.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 38.5 percentage points.
